---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: ["bug", "triage"]
---

## Bug Description

What went wrong? Be specific.

## Expected Behavior

What should have happened instead?

## Steps to Reproduce

How can we reproduce this?

1. Open document X
2. Select PrintMD printer
3. Choose destination folder
4. Click Print
5. See error (describe)

## Environment

- **macOS version:** (e.g., macOS 14.6 Sonoma)
- **Mac hardware:** (e.g., M3 Max)
- **PrintMD version:** (e.g., v0.1.0 or "latest from source")
- **Document type:** (PDF, webpage, Word doc, email, etc.)

## Relevant Logs

Include any error messages or log output:

```
[Paste error messages or CUPS logs if available]
```

## Screenshots

If visual, attach a screenshot.

## Additional Context

Anything else that might help?

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read SPEC.md and confirmed this is unexpected behavior
- [ ] I have searched existing issues
- [ ] I can reproduce this consistently
